hero.titleBefore: Your RabbitMQ is running. Do you actually know
hero.subtitle: No Prometheus. No Grafana. No dedicated ops person needed. Enter your URL — full queue monitoring in under 2 minutes.
hero.noCreditCard: 2-minute setup · No credit card · Free & open source · Try Pro features for 14 days

comparison.title: You find out about issues from your users,

traditional.title: The built-in RabbitMQ Management Plugin
traditional.point1: You find out about issues from your users, not from your monitoring
traditional.point2: You're debugging a queue filling up at 11pm — depth, no cause
traditional.point3: 3 servers, 3 tabs, no single view of what's wrong
traditional.point4: The Grafana dashboards your team built last year that nobody maintains

qarote.title: Qarote
qarote.point1: Alerts fire before your users notice — email, Slack, webhooks
qarote.point2: Rate-of-change, consumer health, and root cause in one screen
qarote.point3: All your servers and environments in a single dashboard
qarote.point4: Zero-setup monitoring — connect in 2 minutes, no scripts, no maintenance

features.title: All you really care about.
features.freeTierNote: Core features are free forever. Alerting, multi-server, and advanced analytics require a Pro plan.

liveQueueMonitoring.title: Live queue monitoring
liveQueueMonitoring.description: Monitor queue depths, message rates, and consumer counts with live updates. Track message accumulation and processing performance.

smartAlertingSystem.title: Smart alerting system
smartAlertingSystem.description: Intelligent alerts for queue backlogs, memory usage, and performance issues. Customizable thresholds with severity-based notifications.

queueManagement.title: Queue management
queueManagement.description: Pause, resume, and delete queues with one click. Create exchanges, bind queues, and manage routing keys through an intuitive interface.

performanceAnalytics.title: Performance analytics
performanceAnalytics.description: Detailed metrics on memory usage, disk space, file descriptors, and message throughput. Visualize trends with beautiful charts and graphs.

multiServerSupport.title: Multi-server support
multiServerSupport.description: Connect to multiple RabbitMQ clusters and switch between them seamlessly. Support for different environments and configurations.

messagePublishing.title: Message publishing
messagePublishing.description: Test and debug your applications by publishing messages directly to queues and exchanges. Perfect for development and troubleshooting.

deadLetterQueueMonitoring.title: Dead-letter queue monitoring
deadLetterQueueMonitoring.description: Know when messages are failing before your users do. DLQ growth rate is the leading indicator most teams miss — visible in real time.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Self-Hosted Solution
enterprise.description: For organizations requiring on-premise deployment, complete data control, and enterprise-grade features. Deploy Qarote in your own infrastructure with full access to advanced capabilities.
enterprise.unlimitedServersDesc: Monitor as many RabbitMQ servers as you need
enterprise.advancedSecurityDesc: Complete control over your data and deployment

connection.title: Connect easily with your RabbitMQ servers
connection.subtitle: Don't change the way your RabbitMQ servers work, Qarote is specially made for this message broker.

step1.title: Sign up
step1.description: Create your account in seconds. No credit card required. Start monitoring your RabbitMQ infrastructure immediately.
step1.transformMonitoring: Transform the way you monitor RabbitMQ.

step2.title: Add your servers
step2.description: Connect your RabbitMQ servers with a simple connection. Support for multiple environments and clusters.

step3.title: Monitor and collaborate
step3.description: Get real-time insights into your queues, exchanges, and message flow. Monitor with your team and set up alerts.

audience.title: Built for teams like yours
audience.card1Description: Your team runs RabbitMQ. Nobody has set up proper monitoring yet.
audience.card1Detail: Free for one server. Connect in 2 minutes.
audience.card2Description: Grafana covers your infrastructure. It doesn't surface what your consumers are actually doing.
audience.card2Detail: Topology visualization, incident diagnosis, message tracing — the layer Prometheus metrics don't see.

finalCta.title: Ready to monitor your RabbitMQ servers?
finalCta.subtitle: Start monitoring your RabbitMQ servers for free today.
finalCta.freeTierScope: Free tier: 1 server, live monitoring, queue management — no time limit. Alerting and multi-server from $29/mo.

founderQuote.highlight: Qarote is the gap between those two numbers.
founderQuote.name: Brice Tessier

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Qarote
faqSection.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

seo.title: Qarote — Self-Hosted RabbitMQ Monitoring Dashboard
seo.description: The self-hosted RabbitMQ monitoring tool and alerting dashboard for developers. Connect in 2 minutes — no Prometheus, no Grafana. Free & open source.
